channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: 3 Americans held for years in China have been released, the White House says
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Three American citizens imprisoned for years by China have been released and are returning to the United States, the White House said Wednesday, announcing a diplomatic agreement with Beijing in the final months of the Biden administration.
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, AAMER MADHANI and MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah senator coaches GOP aides on strategy for streamlining Trump’s agenda through Congress
item.description: Sen. Mike Lee and the GOP steering committee are holding trainings for GOP staff ahead of budget reconciliation so that they can quickly move President-elect Donald Trump's policies through.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Schools are bracing for upheaval over fear of mass deportations
item.description: Regardless of whether President-elect Donald Trump follows through on his pledge to deport millions of immigrants, educators around the U.S. are bracing for upheaval.
item.dc:creator: Bianca Vázquez Toness, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump picks Jay Bhattacharya, who backed COVID herd immunity, to lead National Institutes of Health
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has chosen Dr. Jay Bhattacharya to lead the National Institutes of Health.
item.dc:creator: Carla K. Johnson, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: US lawmakers react to ceasefire deal between Israel and Hezbollah
item.description: U.S. lawmakers reacted Tuesday to the ceasefire deal reached between Israel and Hezbollah, with one suggesting the deal is nothing but a political football.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump team says Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire deal brokered by Biden is actually Trump's win
item.description: The Biden administration kept President-elect Donald Trump’s administration closely apprised of its efforts to broker the ceasefire deal between Israel and Hezbollah that took effect early Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: After delay, Trump signs agreement with Biden White House to begin formal transition handoff
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Tuesday reached a required agreement with President Joe Biden’s White House to allow his transition staff to coordinate with the existing federal workforce before taking office on Jan. 20.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump 'border czar' willing to 'jail' Denver mayor over deportation position
item.description: "But, look, me and the Denver mayor, we agree on one thing. He’s willing to go to jail, I’m willing to put him in jail.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: Expert touts Trump's energy sector nominations, outlines hopes for administration agenda to spark energy boom
item.description: Fox News Digital spoke to energy expert Gabriella Hoffman about what she hopes to see over the next four years under President-elect Trump's energy policies.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump threatens to impose sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China on first day in office
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump threatened to impose sweeping new tariffs on Mexico, Canada and China as soon as he takes office as part of his effort to crack down on illegal immigration and drugs.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump transition team suggests sidelining top adviser over pay-to-play allegations
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The top lawyer on Donald Trump's transition team investigated a longtime adviser to the president-elect over allegations he used his proximity to Trump to score payments from those seeking roles or influence in the new administration.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 5 takeaways as Trump rounds out his second Cabinet
item.description: President-elect Trump is rounding out his Cabinet just a few weeks after securing a second White House term, filling the top jobs that will carry out his agenda in the years to come.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Biden proposes Medicare, Medicaid cover costly weight-loss drugs like like Wegovy or Ozempic
item.description: A bipartisan coalition of congressional members have lobbied for the drugs to be covered by Medicare, saying it could save the government from spending billions of dollars on treating chronic ailments that stem from obesity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump has promised lower taxes. These are 3 ways it could impact you
item.description: From "no tax on tips" to Social Security, Donald Trump has made a range of promises about the taxes Americans will pay. We take a look at three changes we could see in the months ahead.
item.dc:creator: Laurel Wamsley, MPR News

item.title: At the White House, it’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas
item.description: The first lady invited military-connected families to join her on her final turn of decking the White House halls.
item.dc:creator: Tanya Noury, NewsNation

item.title: Senate Intelligence Committee to ask Gabbard 'lots of questions': Lankford
item.description: Sen. James Lankford (R-Okla.) said Sunday that the Senate Intelligence Committee will ask President-elect Trump’s pick for director of national intelligence, former Democratic Rep. Tulsi Gabbard (Hawaii), “lots of questions.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: How NYC congestion pricing tolls could impact drivers
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – New York Gov. Kathy Hochul recently introduced a new plan to toll drivers who enter Manhattan below 60th Street. The revised congestion pricing plan would cost most drivers $9 during peak hours and $2.25 during off-peak hours. It's expected to go into effect in January.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: NJ Rep. Gottheimer vows to fight congestion pricing
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) — Rep. Josh Gottheimer has been a staunch opponent of congestion pricing since its introduction. Now, with a new plan set in motion by New York Gov.
item.dc:creator: Dan Mannarino, PIX 11

item.title: State GOP, Dems react to Trump selecting Pam Bondi to be next AG
item.description: Former Florida Attorney General and Temple Terrace native Pam Bondi has been selected to be President-elect Donald Trump’s next U.S. Attorney General.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Florida officials allege 'pervasive' discrimination against Trump supporters at FEMA
item.description: Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody and U.S. Rep. Vern Buchanan will hold a news conference Friday "to discuss their efforts to uncover evidence of political discrimination at FEMA and demand accountability," according to a release from Buchanan's office.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump names former Florida AG Pam Bondi as his new pick for U.S. attorney general
item.description: After former Rep. Matt Gaetz withdrew from consideration, President-elect Donald Trump named Pam Bondi, a former attorney general of Florida, as his next pick for U.S. attorney general.
item.dc:creator: NPR Washington Desk, MPR News

item.title: Here’s how Trump and the GOP may try to weaken Obamacare
item.description: Republican control of the White House and Congress sets the stage for potentially seismic changes including curtailing Medicaid, weakening patient protections, and increasing premium costs for millions.
item.dc:creator: Stephanie Armour, Sam Whitehead, and Julie Rovner, MPR News

item.title: How a Northfield farmer picks which of his turkeys to have pardoned at White House
item.description: The competition to meet the president started months ago when John Zimmerman, his son and neighbors began examining 44 turkeys from his flock for the Thanksgiving honor.
item.dc:creator: Todd Melby, MPR News

item.title: Wabasha County board tries to dock prosecutor’s pay over plea bargains
item.description: The Wabasha County Board says County Attorney Matt Stinson isn’t doing his job. And if the law would let them cut his salary, they would.
item.dc:creator: Catharine Richert and Matt Sepic, MPR News

item.title: Gaetz withdrawal from AG nomination is among quickest in history
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) withdrew his nomination as President-elect Trump’s attorney general on Thursday, putting an end to a chaotic several days on Capitol Hill and making him one of the quickest in history to withdraw from Cabinet nominations.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: Trump chooses Pam Bondi for attorney general pick after Gaetz withdraws
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump on Thursday named Pam Bondi, the former attorney general of Florida, to be U.S. attorney general just hours after his other choice, Matt Gaetz, withdrew his name.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Matt Gaetz withdraws from attorney general nomination
item.description: Former Florida congressman Matt Gaetz said he is no longer seeking the position of U.S. attorney general Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WFLA, NBC
